palette.colors[key];\n    });\n\n    // Update draw state blade to reflect new colors\n    this.updateDrawStateBlade();\n    \n    // Update grid rendering\n    this.updateGrid();\n  }\n\n  private applyEdgePalette(paletteName: string) {\n    const palette = this.palettes.find(p => p.name === paletteName);\n    if (!palette) return;\n\n    // Update edge palette in config\n    Object.keys(palette.colors).forEach(key => {\n      this.config.edgePalette[parseInt(key)] = palette.colors[key];\n    });\n    \n    // Update grid rendering\n    this.updateGrid();\n  }\n\n  private async initPixi() {\n    this.app = new Application();\n    await this.app.init({ \n      antialias: true, \n      resizeTo: window,\n      backgroundColor: 0x1a1a1a,\n    });\n    \n    const appElement = document.getElementById('app');\n    if (appElement) {\n      appElement.appendChild(this.app.canvas);\n    }\n\n    this.gridContainer = new Container();\n    this.edgeContainer = new Container();\n    this.particleContainer = new Container();\n    this.app.stage.addChild(this.gridContainer);\n    this.app.stage.addChild(this.edgeContainer);\n    this.app.stage.addChild(this.particleContainer);\n\n    // Initialize particle system\n    this.particleSystem = new ParticleSystem(this.particleContainer);\n\n    // Setup particle update loop\n    this.app.ticker.add((ticker) => {\n      this.particleSystem.update(\n        ticker.deltaMS,\n        this.config.particleSpeed,\n        this.config.gridScale,\n        this.gridRenderer,\n        this.config.gridWidth,\n        this.config.gridHeight,\n        this.config.gridType,\n        this.config.edgeSelectionRule,\n        this.mouseX,\n        this.mouseY\n      );\n    });\n\n    // resizeTo: window handles resizing automatically\n  }\n\n  private initTweakpane() {\n    this.pane = new Pane({ title: 'Grid Controls' });\n\n    // Add grid width control\n    this.pane.addBinding(this.config, 'gridWidth', {\n      min: 1,\n      max: 80,\n      step: 1,\n      label: 'Grid Width',\n    }).on('change', () => {\n      this.updateGrid();\n    });\n\n    // Add grid height control\n    this.pane.addBinding(this.config, 'gridHeight', {\n      min: 1,\n      max: 50,\n      step: 1,\n      label: 'Grid Height',\n    }).on('change', () => {\n      this.updateGrid();\n    });\n\n    // Add grid type control\n    this.pane.addBinding(this.config, 'gridType', {\n      options: {\n        squares: 'squares',\n        hexagons: 'hexagons',\n        triangles: 'triangles',\n      },\n      label: 'Grid Type',\n    }).on('change', () => {\n      this.updateGrid();\n    });\n\n    // Add grid scale control\n    this.pane.addBinding(this.config, 'gridScale', {\n      min: 5,\n      max: 100,\n      step: 1,\n      label: 'Grid Scale',\n    }).on('change', () => {\n      this.updateGrid();\n    });\n\n    // Add number of states control\n    this.pane.addBinding(this.config, 'numStates', {\n      min: 2,\n      max: 8,\n      step: 1,\n      label: 'Number of States',\n    }).on('change', () => {\n      // Clamp drawState to valid range when numStates changes\n      if (this.config.drawState >= this.config.numStates) {\n        this.config.drawState = this.config.numStates - 1;\n      }\n      // Rebuild draw state selector\n      this.updateDrawStateBlade();\n      this.updateGrid();\n    });\n\n    // Add palette selection dropdown\n    const paletteOptions: Record<string, string> = {};\n    this.palettes.forEach(palette => }).on('change', () => {\n      this.applyPalette(this.config.selectedPalette);\n    });\n\n    // Add edge palette selection dropdown\n    const edgePaletteOptions: Record<string, string> = {};\n edgePaletteOptions,\n      label: 'Edge Palette',\n    }).on('change', () => {\n      this.applyEdgePalette(this.config.selectedEdgePalette);\n    });\n\n    // Add edge color picker\n    this.pane.addBinding(this.config, 'edgeColor', {\n      label: 'Edge Color'\n    }).on('change', () => {\n      this.updateGrid();\n    });\n\n    // Add edge width slider\n    this.pane.addBinding(this.config, 'edgeWidth', {\n      label: 'Edge Width',\n      min: 0,\n      max: 10,\n      step: 0.1,\n    }).on('change', () => {\n      this.updateGrid();\n    });\n\n    // Add visualize edge delta checkbox\n    this.pane.addBinding(this.config, 'visualizeEdgeDelta', {\n      label: 'Visualize Edge Delta'\n    }).on('change', () => {\n      this.updateGrid();\n    });\n\n    // Add draw state selector (palette color picker)\n    this.updateDrawStateBlade();\n\n    // Add show coordinates checkbox\n    this.pane.addBinding(this.config, 'showCoordinates', {\n      label: 'Show Coordinates',\n    }).on('change', () => {\n      this.updateGrid();\n    });\n\n    // Add left click mode dropdown\n    this.pane.addBinding(this.config, 'leftClickMode', {\n      options: {\n        'Draw Cell': 'draw',\n        'Spawn Particle': 'spawnParticle',\n      },\n      label: 'Left Click Mode',\n    });\n\n    // Add particle speed control\n    this.pane.addBinding(this.config, 'particleSpeed', {\n      min: 1,\n      max: 400,\n      step: 1,\n      label: 'Particle Speed',\n    });\n\n    // Add edge selection rule dropdown\n    this.pane.addBinding(this.config, 'edgeSelectionRule', {\n      options: {\n        'Random (No Backtrack)': 'randomNoBacktrack',\n        'Random (With Backtrack)': 'randomWithBacktrack',\n        'Always Turn Clockwise': 'clockwise',\n        'Always Turn Counter-Clockwise': 'counterClockwise',\n        'Follow Cursor': 'followCursor',\n        'Avoid Cursor': 'avoidCursor',\n      },\n      label: 'Edge Selection Rule',\n    });\n\n    // Add save/load PNG buttons\n    this.pane.addButton({\n      title: 'Save to PNG',\n      label: 'Save to PNG',\n    }).on('click', () => {\n      this.saveToPNG();\n    });\n\n    this.pane.addButton({\n      title: 'Load from PNG',\n      label: 'Load from PNG',\n    }).on('click', () => {\n      this.loadFromPNG();\n    });\n  }\n\n  private saveToPNG() {\n    // Create a canvas with grid dimensions\n    const canvas = document.createElement('canvas');\n    canvas.width = this.config.gridWidth;\n    canvas.height = this.config.gridHeight;\n    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');\n    if (!ctx) return;\n\n    // Create ImageData\n    const imageData = ctx.createImageData(canvas.width, canvas.height);\n    const data = imageData.data;\n\n    // Convert states to grayscale\n    for (let row = 0; row < this.config.gridHeight; row++) {\n      for (let col = 0; col < this.config.gridWidth; col++) {\n        const state = this.cellStates[row]?.[col] ?? 0;\n        const grayscale = Math.round(255 * state / (this.config.numStates - 1));\n        const index = (row * canvas.width + col) * 4;\n        data[index] = grayscale;     // R\n        data[index + 1] = grayscale; // G\n        data[index + 2] = grayscale; // B\n        data[index + 3] = 255;       // A\n      }\n    }\n\n    // Draw ImageData to canvas\n    ctx.putImageData(imageData, 0, 0);\n\n    // Convert to PNG and download\n    canvas.toBlob((blob) => {\n      if (!blob) return;\n      const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);\n      const a = document.createElement('a');\n      a.href = url;\n      a.download = 'grid.png';\n      document.body.appendChild(a);\n      a.click();\n      document.body.removeChild(a);\n      URL.revokeObjectURL(url);\n    }, 'image/png');\n  }\n\n  private loadFromPNG() {\n    // Create file input element\n    const input = document.createElement('input');\n    input.type = 'file';\n    input.accept = 'image/png';\n    input.onchange = (e: Event) => {\n      const file = (e.target as HTMLInputElement).files?.[0];\n      if (!file) return;\n\n      const reader = new FileReader();\n      reader.onload = (event) => {\n        const img = new Image();\n        img.onload = () => {\n          // Create temporary canvas to read image data\n          const canvas = document.createElement('canvas');\n          canvas.width = img.width;\n          canvas.height = img.height;\n          const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');\n          if (!ctx) return;\n\n          ctx.drawImage(img, 0, 0);\n          const imageData = ctx.getImageData(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);\n          const data = imageData.data;\n\n          // Resize grid if needed\n          if (canvas.width !== this.config.gridWidth || canvas.height !== this.config.gridHeight) {\n            this.config.gridWidth = canvas.width;\n            this.config.gridHeight = canvas.height;\n this.config.gridHeight; row++) {\n            for (let col = 0; col < this.config.gridWidth; col++) {\n              const index = (row * canvas.width + col) * 4;\n              const r = data[index];\n              const g = data[index + 1];\n              const b = data[index + 2];\n              // Use average of RGB as grayscale value\n              const grayscale = Math.round((r + g + b) / 3);\n              // Convert back to state\n              const state = Math.round(grayscale * (this.config.numStates - 1) / 255);\n              // Clamp to valid range\n img.src = event.target?.result as string;\n      };\\n      reader.readAsDataURL(file);\n    };\n    input.click();\n  }\n\n  private updateDrawStateBlade() {\n    // Remove existing blade if it exists\n    if (this.drawStateBlade) {\n      this.drawStateBlade.dispose();\n    }\n\n    // Create custom blade for draw state selection\n    this.drawStateBlade = createDrawStateBlade({\n      numStates: this.config.numStates,\n      palette: this.config.palette,\n      drawState: this.config.drawState,\n      onStateChange: (state: number) => {\n        this.config.drawState = state;\n        if (this.drawStateBlade) {\n          this.drawStateBlade.update({\n            numStates: this.config.numStates,\n            palette: this.config.palette,\n            drawState: this.config.drawState,\n            onStateChange: (state: number) => {\n              this.config.drawState = state;\n            },\n          });\n        }\n      },\n    });\n\n    // Add the blade to the pane\n    this.pane.add(this.drawStateBlade);\n  }\n\n  private initGrid() {\n    this.gridRenderer = new GridRenderer();\n    this.updateGrid();\n  }\n\n  private updateGrid() {\n    // Initialize cell states if needed\n    if (this.cellStates.length !== this.config.gridHeight || \n        this.cellStates[0]?.length !== this.config.gridWidth) {\n      this.cellStates = Array(this.config.gridHeight)\n        .fill(0)\n        .map(() => Array(this.config.gridWidth).fill(0));\n    }\n\n    // Clear existing graphics (but keep particles)\n    this.gridContainer.removeChildren();\n    this.edgeContainer.removeChildren();\n    this.highlightedEdge = null;\n    this.highlightedCell = null;\n    this.highlightedVertex = null;\n\n    // Calculate grid dimensions based on type\n    let gridWidth: number, gridHeight: number;\n    if (this.config.gridType === 'squares') {\n      gridWidth = this.config.gridWidth * this.config.gridScale;\n      gridHeight = this.config.gridHeight * this.config.gridScale;\n    } else if (this.config.gridType === 'hexagons') {\n      const hexSpacingX = this.config.gridScale * Math.sqrt(3);\n      const hexSpacingY = this.config.gridScale * 1.5;\n      gridWidth = this.config.gridWidth * hexSpacingX + this.config.gridScale;\n      gridHeight = this.config.gridHeight * hexSpacingY + this.config.gridScale;\n    } else { // triangles\n      const triangleHeight = this.config.gridScale * Math.sqrt(3) / 2;\n      gridWidth = this.config.gridWidth * this.config.gridScale * 0.5 + this.config.gridScale;\n      gridHeight = this.config.gridHeight * triangleHeight + triangleHeight;\n    }\n\n    // Center the grid\n    const offsetX = (this.app.screen.width - gridWidth) / 2;\n    const offsetY = (this.app.screen.height - gridHeight) / 2;\n\n    // Position all containers at the same offset so cells, edges, and particles align\n    this.gridContainer.x = offsetX;\n    this.gridContainer.y = offsetY;\n    this.edgeContainer.x = offsetX;\n    this.edgeContainer.y = offsetY;\n    this.particleContainer.x = offsetX;\n    this.particleContainer.y = offsetY;\n\n    // Convert palette to string format for renderer\n    const paletteStrings: Record<number, string> = {};\n    for (const [key, value] of Object.entries(this.config.palette)) {\n      paletteStrings[parseInt(key)] = typeof value === 'string' ? value : '#000000';\n    }\n\n    // Convert edge palette to string format for renderer\n    const edgePaletteStrings: Record<number, string> = {};\n    for (const [key, value] of Object.entries(this.config.edgePalette)) {\n      edgePaletteStrings[parseInt(key)] = typeof value === 'string' ? value : '#000000';\n    }\n\n    // Render grid\n    this.gridRenderer.render(\n      this.gridContainer,\n      this.edgeContainer,\n      this.config.gridWidth,\n      this.config.gridHeight,\n      this.config.gridType,\n      this.config.gridScale,\n      this.cellStates,\n      paletteStrings,\n      typeof this.config.edgeColor === 'string' ? this.config.edgeColor : '#ffffff',\n      this.config.edgeWidth,\n      this.config.showCoordinates\n    );\n  }\n\n  private setupInteraction() {\n    const canvas = this.app.canvas;\n    canvas.addEventListener('mousemove', (e: MouseEvent) => this.handleMouseMove(e));\n    canvas.addEventListener('mousedown', (e: MouseEvent) => this.handleMouseDown(e));\n    canvas.addEventListener('contextmenu', (e: MouseEvent) => e.preventDefault());\n  }\n\n  private handleMouseMove(e: MouseEvent) {\n    const canvas = this.app.canvas;\n    const rect = canvas.getBoundingClientRect();\n    // Use edgeContainer position since edges are in edgeContainer\n    const x = e.clientX - rect.left - this.edgeContainer.x;\n    const y = e.clientY - rect.top - this.edgeContainer.y;\n\n    // Store mouse position for particle cursor rules\n    this.mouseX = x;\n    this.mouseY = y;\n\n    // Remove previous highlights\n    if (this.highlightedEdge) {\n      this.edgeContainer.removeChild(this.highlightedEdge);\n      this.highlightedEdge = null;\n    }\n    if (this.highlightedCell) {\n      this.gridContainer.removeChild(this.highlightedCell);\n      this.highlightedCell = null;\n    }\n    if (this.highlightedVertex) {\n      this.edgeContainer.removeChild(this.highlightedVertex);\n      this.highlightedVertex = null;\n    }\n\n    if (this.config.leftClickMode === 'draw') {\n      // Highlight cell\n      const cellInfo = this.gridRenderer.getCellAt(\n        x, y,\n        this.config.gridWidth,\n        this.config.gridHeight,\n        this.config.gridType,\n        this.config.gridScale\n      );\n\n      if (cellInfo) {\n        const highlightColor = typeof this.config.edgeHighlightColor === 'string' \n          ? this.config.edgeHighlightColor \n          : '#ffff00';\n        this.highlightedCell = this.gridRenderer.drawCellHighlight(\n          cellInfo,\n          this.config.gridWidth,\n          this.config.gridHeight,\n          this.config.gridType,\n          this.config.gridScale,\n          highlightColor\n        );\n        this.gridContainer.addChild(this.highlightedCell);\n      }\n    } else {\n      // Highlight edge and closest vertex\n      const edgeInfo = this.gridRenderer.getEdgeAt(\n        x, y,\n        this.config.gridWidth,\n        this.config.gridHeight,\n        this.config.gridType,\n        this.config.gridScale\n      );\n\n      if (edgeInfo) {\n        const highlightColor = typeof this.config.edgeHighlightColor === 'string' \n          ? this.config.edgeHighlightColor \n          : '#ffff00';\n        this.highlightedEdge = this.gridRenderer.drawEdge(edgeInfo, highlightColor);\n        this.edgeContainer.addChild(this.highlightedEdge);\n\n        // Find and highlight closest vertex\n        const closestVertex = this.gridRenderer.getClosestVertex(\n          x, y,\n          this.config.gridWidth,\n          this.config.gridHeight,\n          this.config.gridType,\n          this.config.gridScale\n        );\n\n        if (closestVertex) {\n          this.highlightedVertex = this.gridRenderer.drawVertex(closestVertex, highlightColor);\n          if (this.highlightedVertex) {\n            this.edgeContainer.addChild(this.highlightedVertex);\n          }\n        }\n      }\n    }\n  }\n\n  private handleMouseDown(e: MouseEvent) {\n    const canvas = this.app.canvas;\n    const rect = this.edgeContainer.x;\n        const edgeY = e.clientY - rect.top - this.edgeContainer.y;\n        \n        const edgeInfo = this.gridRenderer.getEdgeAt(\n          edgeX, edgeY,\n {
  "id": "read_file-1766456937722-ee167bd58f936",

    "output": "import { Graphics, Container } from 'pixi.js';\nimport { Point, EdgeInfo, GridType } from './types';\n\ntype EdgeSelectionRule = 'randomNoBacktrack' | 'randomWithBacktrack' | 'clockwise' | 'counterClockwise' | 'followCursor' | 'avoidCursor';\n\nexport interface Particle {\n  x: number;\n  y: number;\n  currentEdge: EdgeInfo;\n  direction: number; // 1 = toward points[1], -1 = toward points[0]\n  progress: number; // 0 to 1 along current edge\n  previousEdge: EdgeInfo | null;\n}\n\nexport class ParticleSystem {\n  private particles: Particle[] = [];\n  private particleContainer: Container;\n  private particleGraphics: Map<Particle, Graphics> = new Map();\n\n  constructor(container: Container) {\n    this.particleContainer = container;\n  }\n\n  spawnParticle(edge: EdgeInfo, clickX: number, clickY: number): void {\n    const p1 = edge.points[0];\n    const p2 = edge.points[1];\n    \n    // Calculate distance to each vertex\n    const dist1 = Math.sqrt((clickX - p1.x) ** 2 + (clickY - p1.y) ** 2);\n    const dist2 = Math.sqrt((clickX - p2.x) ** 2 + (clickY - p2.y) ** 2);\n    \n    // Determine direction (toward closer vertex)\n    const direction = dist1 < dist2 ? -1 : 1;\n    \n    // Calculate initial progress along edge\n    const edgeLength = Math.sqrt((p2.x - p1.x) ** 2 + (p2.y - p1.y) ** 2);\n    let progress: number;\n    if (direction === -1) {\n      // Moving toward p1\n      const distFromP1 = dist1;\n      progress = 1 - (distFromP1 / edgeLength);\n    } else {\n      // Moving toward p2\n      const distFromP2 = dist2;\n      progress = distFromP2 / edgeLength;\n    }\n    \n    // Clamp progress\n    progress = Math.max(0, Math.min(1, progress));\n    \n    // Calculate initial position\n    const x = p1.x + (p2.x - p1.x) * progress;\n    const y = p1.y + (p2.y - p1.y) * progress;\n    \n    const particle: Particle = {\n      x,\n      y,\n      currentEdge: edge,\n      direction,\n      progress,\n      previousEdge: null,\n    };\n    \n    this.particles.push(particle);\n    this.createParticleGraphics(particle);\n  }\n\n  private createParticleGraphics(particle: Particle): void {\n    const graphics = new Graphics();\n    graphics.circle(0, 0, 4);\n    graphics.fill({ color: 0x00ff00 });\n    graphics.x = particle.x;\n    graphics.y = particle.y;\n    this.particleContainer.addChild(graphics);\n    this.particleGraphics.set(particle, graphics);\n  }\n\n  update(deltaTime: number, particleSpeed: number, gridScale: number, gridRenderer: any, gridWidth: number, gridHeight: number, gridType: GridType, edgeSelectionRule: EdgeSelectionRule, mouseX: number, mouseY: number): void {\n    const distancePerSecond = particleSpeed; // units per second\n    const distanceThisFrame = (distancePerSecond * deltaTime) / 1000; // convert ms to seconds\n    \n    for (let i = this.particles.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {\n      const particle = this.particles[i];\n      const edge = particle.currentEdge;\n      const p1 = edge.points[0];\n      const p2 = edge.points[1];\n      \n      // Calculate edge length\n      const edgeLength = Math.sqrt((p2.x - p1.x) ** 2 + (p2.y - p1.y) ** 2);\n      \n      // Move particle along edge\n      if (particle.direction === 1) {\n        // Moving toward p2\n        particle.progress += distanceThisFrame / edgeLength;\n      } else {\n        // Moving toward p1\n        particle.progress -= distanceThisFrame / edgeLength;\n      }\n      \n      console.log(\"particle.progress\", particle.progress);\n      // Check if reached vertex\n      if (particle.progress >= 1) {\n        // Reached p2\n        this.handleVertexArrival(particle, p2, gridRenderer, gridWidth, gridHeight, gridType, gridScale, edgeSelectionRule, mouseX, mouseY);\n      } else if (particle.progress <= 0) {\n        // Reached p1\n        this.handleVertexArrival(particle, p1, gridRenderer, gridWidth, gridHeight, gridType, gridScale, edgeSelectionRule, mouseX, mouseY);\n      } else {\n        // Update position along edge\n        particle.x = p1.x + (p2.x - p1.x) * particle.progress;\n        particle.y = p1.y + (p2.y - p1.y) * particle.progress;\n        \n        // Update graphics\n        const graphics = this.particleGraphics.get(particle);\n        if (graphics) {\n          graphics.x = particle.x;\n          graphics.y = particle.y;\n        }\n      }\n    }\n  }\n\n  private handleVertexArrival(\n    particle: Particle,\n    vertex: Point,\n    gridRenderer: { getEdgesAtVertex: (vertex: Point, width: number, height: number, gridType: GridType, scale: number) => EdgeInfo[] },\n    gridWidth: number,\n    gridHeight: number,\n    gridType: GridType,\n    gridScale: number,\n    edgeSelectionRule: EdgeSelectionRule,\n    mouseX: number,\n    mouseY: number\n  ): void {\n    // Find all edges connected to this vertex\n    const connectedEdges = gridRenderer.getEdgesAtVertex(vertex, gridWidth, gridHeight, gridType, gridScale);\n    \n    if (connectedEdges.length === 0) {\n      // No edges found, remove particle\n      this.removeParticle(particle);\n      return;\n    }\n    \n    let availableEdges: EdgeInfo[];\n    let nextEdge: EdgeInfo;\n    \n    if (edgeSelectionRule === 'randomNoBacktrack') {\n      // Filter out the edge we're currently on (the one we just arrived from)\n      availableEdges = connectedEdges.filter(edge => {\n        if (!particle.currentEdge) return true;\n        // Check if this edge is the same as the current edge we're on\n        const currentP1 = particle.currentEdge.points[0];\n        const currentP2 = particle.currentEdge.points[1];\n        const edgeP1 = edge.points[0];\n        const edgeP2 = edge.points[1];\n        \n        // Check if edges are the same (same two points, regardless of order)\n        const sameEdge = (\n          (this.pointsEqual(currentP1, edgeP1) && this.pointsEqual(currentP2, edgeP2)) ||\n          (this.pointsEqual(currentP1, edgeP2) && this.pointsEqual(currentP2, edgeP1))\n        );\n        \n        return !sameEdge;\n      });\n      \n      if (availableEdges.length === 0) {\n        this.removeParticle(particle);\n        return;\n      }\n      \n      // Choose random edge\n      nextEdge = availableEdges[Math.floor(Math.random() * availableEdges.length)];\n    } else if (edgeSelectionRule === 'randomWithBacktrack') {\n      // Allow all edges including the one we came from\n      if (connectedEdges.length === 0) {\n        this.removeParticle(particle);\n        return;\n      }\n      nextEdge = connectedEdges[Math.floor(Math.random() * connectedEdges.length)];\n    } else if (edgeSelectionRule === 'clockwise' || edgeSelectionRule === 'counterClockwise') {\n      // Find the edge that is clockwise or counter-clockwise from the current edge\n      if (!particle.currentEdge) {\n        // If no current edge, fall back to random\n        if (connectedEdges.length === 0) {\n          this.removeParticle(particle);\n          return;\n        }\n        nextEdge = connectedEdges[Math.floor(Math.random() * connectedEdges.length)];\n      } else {\n        const foundEdge = this.findTurnEdge(\n          particle.currentEdge,\n          vertex,\n          connectedEdges,\n          edgeSelectionRule === 'clockwise'\n        );\n        \n        if (!foundEdge) {\n          // No valid turn found, remove particle\n          this.removeParticle(particle);\n          return;\n        }\n        nextEdge = foundEdge;\n      }\n    } else if (edgeSelectionRule === 'followCursor' || edgeSelectionRule === 'avoidCursor') {\n      // Find the edge that minimizes or maximizes distance to cursor\n      if (connectedEdges.length === 0) {\n        this.removeParticle(particle);\n        return;\n      }\n      \n      // Filter out current edge for follow/avoid cursor rules\n      const availableEdges = connectedEdges.filter(edge => {\n        if (!particle.currentEdge) return true;\n        const currentP1 = particle.currentEdge.points[0];\n        const currentP2 = particle.currentEdge.points[1];\n        const edgeP1 = edge.points[0];\n        const edgeP2 = edge.points[1];\n        \n        const sameEdge = (\n          (this.pointsEqual(currentP1, edgeP1) && this.pointsEqual(currentP2, edgeP2)) ||\n          (this.pointsEqual(currentP1, edgeP2) && this.pointsEqual(currentP2, edgeP1))\n        );\n        \n        return !sameEdge;\n      });\n      \n      if (availableEdges.length === 0) {\n        this.removeParticle(particle);\n        return;\n      }\n      \n      const foundEdge = this.findCursorEdge(\n        vertex,\n        availableEdges,\n        mouseX,\n        mouseY,\n        edgeSelectionRule === 'followCursor'\n      );\n      \n      if (!foundEdge) {\n        this.removeParticle(particle);\n        return;\n      }\n      nextEdge = foundEdge;\n    } else {\n      // Fallback to random\n      if (connectedEdges.length === 0) {\n        this.removeParticle(particle);\n        return;\n      }\n      nextEdge = connectedEdges[Math.floor(Math.random() * connectedEdges.length)];\n    }\n    \n    // Determine direction on new edge\n    // We're at a vertex, so we need to move away from it along the new edge\n    const nextP1 = nextEdge.points[0];\n    const vertexIsP1 = this.pointsEqual(vertex, nextP1);\n    \n    particle.previousEdge = particle.currentEdge;\n    particle.currentEdge = nextEdge;\n    \n    if (vertexIsP1) {\n      // Vertex is at p1, so move toward p2 (positive direction)\n      particle.direction = 1;\n      particle.progress = 0; // Start at p1\n    } else {\n      // Vertex is at p2, so move toward p1 (negative direction)\n      particle.direction = -1;\n      particle.progress = 1; // Start at p2\n    }\n    \n    particle.x = vertex.x;\n    particle.y = vertex.y;\n    \n    // Update graphics\n    const graphics = this.particleGraphics.get(particle);\n    if (graphics) {\n      graphics.x = particle.x;\n      graphics.y = particle.y;\n    }\n  }\n\n  private pointsEqual(p1: Point, p2: Point): boolean {\n    const epsilon = 0.01; // Increased epsilon for better floating point comparison\n    return Math.abs(p1.x - p2.x) < epsilon && Math.abs(p1.y - p2.y) < epsilon;\n  }\n\n  private findTurnEdge(\n    currentEdge: EdgeInfo,\n    vertex: Point,\n    connectedEdges: EdgeInfo[],\n    clockwise: boolean\n  ): EdgeInfo | null {\n    // Calculate the angle of the incoming edge (from vertex, pointing away from vertex)\n    const currentP1 = currentEdge.points[0];\n    const currentP2 = currentEdge.points[1];\n    \n    // Find the other endpoint of the current edge (not the vertex)\n    const otherPoint = this.pointsEqual(vertex, currentP1) ? currentP2 : currentP1;\n    \n    // Calculate angle of incoming edge (from vertex to other point)\n    const incomingAngle = Math.atan2(otherPoint.y - vertex.y, otherPoint.x - vertex.x);\n    \n    // Calculate angles of all outgoing edges\n    const edgeAngles: Array<{ edge: EdgeInfo; angle: number; relativeAngle: number }> = [];\n    \n    for (const edge of connectedEdges) {\n      // Skip the current edge\n      const edgeP1 = edge.points[0];\n      const edgeP2 = edge.points[1];\n      const isCurrentEdge = (\n        (this.pointsEqual(currentP1, edgeP1) && this.pointsEqual(currentP2, edgeP2)) ||\n        (this.pointsEqual(currentP1, edgeP2) && this.pointsEqual(currentP2, edgeP1))\n      );\n      \n      if (isCurrentEdge) continue;\n      \n      // Find the other endpoint (not the vertex)\n      const edgeOtherPoint = this.pointsEqual(vertex, edgeP1) ? edgeP2 : edgeP1;\n      \n      // Calculate angle from vertex to other point\n      const angle = Math.atan2(edgeOtherPoint.y - vertex.y, edgeOtherPoint.x - vertex.x);\n      \n      // Calculate relative angle (difference from incoming angle, normalized to -π to π)\n      let relativeAngle = angle - incomingAngle;\n      \n      // Normalize to -π to π\n      while (relativeAngle > Math.PI) relativeAngle -= 2 * Math.PI;\n      while (relativeAngle < -Math.PI) relativeAngle += 2 * Math.PI;\n      \n      edgeAngles.push({ edge, angle, relativeAngle });\n    }\n    \n    if (edgeAngles.length === 0) return null;\n    \n    // Sort by relative angle\n    if (clockwise) {\n      // Clockwise: find the edge with the largest negative relative angle\n      // If none, wrap around to the most positive (which is actually the next clockwise)\n      edgeAngles.sort((a, b) => {\n        // Prefer negative angles (clockwise in screen coordinates where y increases downward)\n        if (a.relativeAngle < 0 && b.relativeAngle >= 0) return 1;\n        if (a.relativeAngle >= 0 && b.relativeAngle < 0) return -1;\n        // Both same sign, sort by magnitude (reverse for clockwise)\n        return b.relativeAngle - a.relativeAngle;\n      });\n      \n      // Find first negative angle, or if none, use the most positive (wraps around)\n      const negativeAngle = edgeAngles.find(e => e.relativeAngle < 0);\n      return negativeAngle ? negativeAngle.edge : edgeAngles[edgeAngles.length - 1].edge;\n    } else {\n      // Counter-clockwise: find the edge with the smallest positive relative angle\n      // If none, wrap around to the most negative (which is actually the next counter-clockwise)\n      edgeAngles.sort((a, b) => {\n        // Prefer positive angles (counter-clockwise in screen coordinates where y increases downward)\n        if (a.relativeAngle > 0 && b.relativeAngle <= 0) return -1;\n        if (a.relativeAngle <= 0 && b.relativeAngle > 0) return 1;\n        // Both same sign, sort by magnitude\n        return a.relativeAngle - b.relativeAngle;\n      });\n      \n      // Find first positive angle, or if none, use the most negative (wraps around)\n      const positiveAngle = edgeAngles.find(e => e.relativeAngle > 0);\n      return positiveAngle ? positiveAngle.edge : edgeAngles[edgeAngles.length - 1].edge;\n    }\n  }\n\n  private findCursorEdge(\n    vertex: Point,\n    connectedEdges: EdgeInfo[],\n    mouseX: number,\n    mouseY: number,\n    follow: boolean\n  ): EdgeInfo | null {\n    if (connectedEdges.length === 0) return null;\n    \n    let bestEdge: EdgeInfo | null = null;\n    let bestDist = follow ? Infinity : -Infinity;\n    \n    for (const edge of connectedEdges) {\n      // Find the other endpoint of the edge (not the vertex)\n      const edgeP1 = edge.points[0];\n      const edgeP2 = edge.points[1];\n      const otherPoint = this.pointsEqual(vertex, edgeP1) ? edgeP2 : edgeP1;\n      \n      // Calculate distance from the other endpoint to cursor\n      const distToCursor = Math.sqrt((mouseX - otherPoint.x) ** 2 + (mouseY - otherPoint.y) ** 2);\n      \n      // For follow: choose edge that minimizes distance to cursor\n      // For avoid: choose edge that maximizes distance to cursor\n      if (follow) {\n        if (distToCursor < bestDist) {\n          bestDist = distToCursor;\n          bestEdge = edge;\n        }\n      } else {\n        if (distToCursor > bestDist) {\n          bestDist = distToCursor;\n          bestEdge = edge;\n        }\n      }\n    }\n    \n    return bestEdge;\n  }\n\n  private removeParticle(particle: Particle): void {\n    const graphics = this.particleGraphics.get(particle);\n    if (graphics) {\n      this.particleContainer.removeChild(graphics);\n      this.particleGraphics.delete(particle);\n    }\n    const index = this.particles.indexOf(particle);\n    if (index > -1) {\n      this.particles.splice(index, 1);\n    }\n  }\n\n  clear(): void {\n    for (const particle of this.particles) {\n      this.removeParticle(particle);\n    }\n  }\n}\n\n"
  }
}

// New: Selected edge palette name\n  edgeColor: ColorValue;                   // Re-add edgeColor\n  edgeWidth: number;                       // New: for edge width\n  edgeHighlightColor: palette\n      edgeColor: '#ffffff',                  // Re-add edgeColor\n      edgeWidth: 1,                          // New: Initialize edge width\n      edgeHighlightColor: '#ffff00',\n    break;\n      case 'hexagons':\n        this.grid = new HexagonGrid(this.config.gridScale);\n        break;\n      case 'triangles':\n        this.grid = new TriangleGrid(this.config.gridScale);\n header.id = 'info-panel-header';\n    \n    const title = document.createElement('h2');\n    title.textContent = 'About';\n    \n    const closeButton = document.createElement('button');\n    closeButton.id = 'info-panel-close';\n    closeButton.innerHTML = '×';\n    closeButton.setAttribute('aria-label', 'Minimize info panel');\n    closeButton.onclick = () => {\n    \n    content.appendChild(description);\n    \n    const links = document.createElement('div');\n    links.id = 'info-panel-links';\n    \n    const manualLink = document.createElement('a');\n    manualLink.href = '#';\n    manualLink.textContent = '📖 User Manual';\n    manualLink.onclick = (e) => {\n      e.preventDefault();\n      alert('Manual coming soon!');\n    };\n    \n    const githubLink = document.createElement('a');\n    githubLink.href = 'https://github.com/example/cursor-hex';\n    githubLink.textContent = '🔗 GitHub Repository';\n    githubLink.target = '_blank';\n    githubLink.rel = 'noopener noreferrer';\n    \n    const statisticsLink = document.createElement('a');\n    statisticsLink.href = 'statistics.html';\n    statisticsLink.textContent = '📊 Project Statistics';\n    \n    links.appendChild(manualLink);\n    links.appendChild(githubLink);\n    links.appendChild(statisticsLink);\n    \n    panel.appendChild(header);\n    panel.appendChild(content);\n    panel.appendChild(links);\n    \n    document.body.appendChild(panel);\n  }\n\n  private applyPalette(paletteName: string) {\n    const palette = this.palettes.find(p => p.name === paletteName);\n    if (!palette) return;\n\n    // Update palette in config\n    Object.keys(palette.colors).forEach(key => {\n      this.config.palette[parseInt(key)] = palette.colors[key];\n    });\n\n    // Update draw state blade to reflect new colors\n    this.updateDrawStateBlade();\n    \n    // Update grid rendering\n    this.updateGrid();\n  }\n\n  private applyEdgePalette(paletteName: string) {\n    const palette = this.palettes.find(p => p.name === paletteName);\n    if (!palette) return;\n\n    // Update edge palette in config\n    Object.keys(palette.colors).forEach(key => {\n      this.config.edgePalette[parseInt(key)] = palette.colors[key];\n    });\n    \n    // Update grid rendering\n    this.updateGrid();\n  }\n\n  private async initPixi() {\n    this.app = new Application();\n    await this.app.init({ \n      antialias: true, \n      resizeTo: window,\n      backgroundColor: 0x1a1a1a,\n    });\n    \n    const appElement = document.getElementById('app');\n    if (appElement) {\n      appElement.appendChild(this.app.canvas);\n    }\n\n    this.gridContainer = new Container();\n    this.edgeContainer = new Container();\n    this.particleContainer = new Container();\n    this.app.stage.addChild(this.gridContainer);\n    this.app.stage.addChild(this.edgeContainer);\n    this.app.stage.addChild(this.particleContainer);\n\n    // Initialize particle system\n    this.particleSystem = new ParticleSystem(this.particleContainer);\n\n    // Setup particle update loop\n    this.app.ticker.add((ticker) => {\n      this.particleSystem.update(\n        ticker.deltaMS,\n        this.config.particleSpeed,\n        this.config.gridScale,\n        this.gridRenderer,\n        this.config.gridWidth,\n        this.config.gridHeight,\n        this.grid, // Pass grid instance\n        this.config.edgeSelectionRule,\n        this.mouseX,\n        this.mouseY\n      );\n    });\n\n    // resizeTo: window handles resizing automatically\n  }\n\n  private initTweakpane() {\n    this.pane = new Pane({ title: 'Grid Controls' });\n\n    // Add grid width control\n    this.pane.addBinding(this.config, 'gridWidth', {\n      min: 1,\n      max: 80,\n      step: 1,\n      label: 'Grid Width',\n    }).on('change', () => {\n      this.updateGrid();\n    });\n\n    // Add grid height control\n    this.pane.addBinding(this.config, 'gridHeight', {\n      min: 1,\n      max: 50,\n      step: 1,\n      label: 'Grid Height',\n    }).on('change', () => {\n      this.updateGrid();\n    });\n\n    // Add grid type control\n    this.pane.addBinding(this.config, 'gridType', {\n      options: {\n        squares: 'squares',\n        hexagons: 'hexagons',\n        triangles: 'triangles',\n      },\n      label: 'Grid Type',\n    }).on('change', () => {\n      this.updateGrid();\n    });\n\n    // Add grid scale control\n    this.pane.addBinding(this.config, 'gridScale', {\n      min: 5,\n      max: 100,\n      step: 1,\n      label: 'Grid Scale',\n    }).on('change', () => {\n      this.updateGrid();\n    });\n\n    // Add number of states control\n    this.pane.addBinding(this.config, 'numStates', {\n      min: 2,\n      max: 8,\n      step: 1,\n      label: 'Number of States',\n    }).on('change', () => {\n      // Clamp drawState to valid range when numStates changes\n      if (this.config.drawState >= this.config.numStates) {\n        this.config.drawState = this.config.numStates - 1;\n      }\n      // Rebuild draw state selector\n      this.updateDrawStateBlade();\n      this.updateGrid();\n    });\n\n    // Add palette selection dropdown\n    const paletteOptions: Record<string, string> = {};\n    this.palettes.forEach(palette => {\n      paletteOptions[palette.name] = palette.name;\n    });\n    \n    this.pane.addBinding(this.config, 'selectedPalette', {\n      options: paletteOptions,\n      label: 'Palette',\n    }).on('change', () => {\n      this.applyPalette(this.config.selectedPalette);\n    });\n\n    // Add edge palette selection dropdown\n    const edgePaletteOptions: Record<string, string> = {};\n    this.palettes.forEach(palette => {\n      edgePaletteOptions[palette.name] = palette.name;\n    });\n    \n    this.pane.addBinding(this.config, 'selectedEdgePalette', {\n      options: edgePaletteOptions,\n      label: 'Edge Palette',\n    }).on('change', () => {\n      this.applyEdgePalette(this.config.selectedEdgePalette);\n    });\n\n    // Add edge color picker\n    this.pane.addBinding(this.config, 'edgeColor', {\n      label: 'Edge Color'\n    }).on('change', () => {\n      this.updateGrid();\n    });\n\n    // Add edge width slider\n    this.pane.addBinding(this.config, 'edgeWidth', {\n      label: 'Edge Width',\n      min: 0,\n      max: 10,\n      step: 0.1,\n    }).on('change', () => {\n      this.updateGrid();\n    });\n\n    // Add visualize edge delta checkbox\n    this.pane.addBinding(this.config, 'visualizeEdgeDelta', {\n      label: 'Visualize Edge Delta'\n    }).on('change', () => {\n      this.updateGrid();\n    });\n\n    // Add draw state selector (palette color picker)\n    this.updateDrawStateBlade();\n\n    // Add show coordinates checkbox\n    this.pane.addBinding(this.config, 'showCoordinates', {\n      label: 'Show Coordinates',\n    }).on('change', () => {\n      this.updateGrid();\n    });\n\n    // Add left click mode dropdown\n    this.pane.addBinding(this.config, 'leftClickMode', {\n      options: {\n        'Draw Cell': 'draw',\n        'Spawn Particle': 'spawnParticle',\n      },\n      label: 'Left Click Mode',\n    });\n\n    // Add particle speed control\n    this.pane.addBinding(this.config, 'particleSpeed', {\n      min: 1,\n      max: 400,\n      step: 1,\n      label: 'Particle Speed',\n    });\n\n    // Add edge selection rule dropdown\n    this.pane.addBinding(this.config, 'edgeSelectionRule', {\n      options: {\n        'Random (No Backtrack)': 'randomNoBacktrack',\n        'Random (With Backtrack)': 'randomWithBacktrack',\n        'Always Turn Clockwise': 'clockwise',\n        'Always Turn Counter-Clockwise': 'counterClockwise',\n        'Follow Cursor': 'followCursor',\n        'Avoid Cursor': 'avoidCursor',\n      },\n      label: 'Edge Selection Rule',\n    });\n\n    // Add save/load PNG buttons\n    this.pane.addButton({\n      title: 'Save to PNG',\n      label: 'Save to PNG',\n    }).on('click', () => {\n      this.saveToPNG();\n    });\n\n    this.pane.addButton({\n      title: 'Load from PNG',\n      label: 'Load from PNG',\n    }).on('click', () => {\n      this.loadFromPNG();\n    });\n  }\n\n  private saveToPNG() {\n    // Create a canvas with grid dimensions\n    const canvas = document.createElement('canvas');\n    canvas.width = this.config.gridWidth;\n    canvas.height = this.config.gridHeight;\n    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');\n    if (!ctx) return;\n\n    // Create ImageData\n    const imageData = ctx.createImageData(canvas.width, canvas.height);\n    const data = imageData.data;\n\n    // Convert states to grayscale\n    for (let row = 0; row < this.config.gridHeight; row++) {\n      for (let col = 0; col < this.config.gridWidth; col++) {\n        const state = this.cellStates[row]?.[col] ?? 0;\n        const grayscale = Math.round(255 * state / (this.config.numStates - 1));\n        const index = (row * canvas.width + col) * 4;\n        data[index] = grayscale;     // R\n        data[index + 1] = grayscale; // G\n        data[index + 2] = grayscale; // B\n        data[index + 3] = 255;       // A\n      }\n    }\n\n    // Draw ImageData to canvas\n    ctx.putImageData(imageData, 0, 0);\n\n    // Convert to PNG and download\n    canvas.toBlob((blob) => {\n      if (!blob) return;\n      const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);\n      const a = document.createElement('a');\n      a.href = url;\n      a.download = 'grid.png';\n      document.body.appendChild(a);\n      a.click();\n      document.body.removeChild(a);\n      URL.revokeObjectURL(url);\n    }, 'image/png');\n  }\n\n  private loadFromPNG() {\n    // Create file input element\n    const input = document.createElement('input');\n    input.type = 'file';\n    input.accept = 'image/png';\n    input.onchange = (e: Event) => {\n      const file = (e.target as HTMLInputElement).files?.[0];\n      if (!file) return;\n\n      const reader = new FileReader();\n      reader.onload = (event) => {\n        const img = new Image();\n        img.onload = () => {\n          // Create temporary canvas to read image data\n          const canvas = document.createElement('canvas');\n          canvas.width = img.width;\n          canvas.height = img.height;\n          const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');\n          if (!ctx) return;\n\n          ctx.drawImage(img, 0, 0);\n          const imageData = ctx.getImageData(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);\n          const data = imageData.data;\n\n          // Resize grid if needed\n          if (canvas.width !== this.config.gridWidth || canvas.height !== this.config.gridHeight) {\n            this.config.gridWidth = canvas.width;\n            this.config.gridHeight = canvas.height;\n            // Update Tweakpane controls if they exist\n            // (The grid will be resized in updateGrid)\n          }\n\n          // Initialize cell states array\n          this.cellStates = Array(this.config.gridHeight)\n            .fill(0)\n            .map(() => Array(this.config.gridWidth).fill(0));\n\n          // Convert grayscale back to states\n          for (let row = 0; row < this.config.gridHeight; row++) {\n            for (let col = 0; col < this.config.gridWidth; col++) {\n              const index = (row * canvas.width + col) * 4;\n              const r = data[index];\n              const g = data[index + 1];\n              const b = data[index + 2];\n              // Use average of RGB as grayscale value\n              const grayscale = Math.round((r + g + b) / 3);\n              // Convert back to state\n              const state = Math.round(grayscale * (this.config.numStates - 1) / 255);\n              // Clamp to valid range\n              this.cellStates[row][col] = Math.max(0, Math.min(this.config.numStates - 1, state));\n            }\n          }\n\n          // Update grid display\n          this.updateGrid();\n        };\n        img.src = event.target?.result as string;\n      };\n      reader.readAsDataURL(file);\n    };\n    input.click();\n  }\n\n  private updateDrawStateBlade() {\n    // Remove existing blade if it exists\n    if (this.drawStateBlade) {\n      this.drawStateBlade.dispose();\n    }\n\n    // Create custom blade for draw state selection\n    this.drawStateBlade = createDrawStateBlade({\n      numStates: this.config.numStates,\n      palette: this.config.palette,\n      drawState: this.config.drawState,\n      onStateChange: (state: number) => {\n        this.config.drawState = state;\n        if (this.drawStateBlade) {\n          this.drawStateBlade.update({\n            numStates: this.config.numStates,\n            palette: this.config.palette,\n            drawState: this.config.drawState,\n            onStateChange: (state: number) => {\n              this.config.drawState = state;\n            },\n          });\n        }\n      },\n    });\n\n    // Add the blade to the pane\n    this.pane.add(this.drawStateBlade);\n  }\n\n  private initGrid() {\n    this.gridRenderer = new GridRenderer();\n    this.updateGrid();\n  }\n\n  private updateGrid() {\n    this.updateGridInstance();\n\n    // Initialize cell states if needed\n    if (this.cellStates.length !== this.config.gridHeight || \n        this.cellStates[0]?.length !== this.config.gridWidth) {\n      this.cellStates = Array(this.config.gridHeight)\n        .fill(0)\n        .map(() => Array(this.config.gridWidth).fill(0));\n    }\n\n    // Clear existing graphics (but keep particles)\n    this.gridContainer.removeChildren();\n    this.edgeContainer.removeChildren();\n    this.highlightedEdge = null;\n    this.highlightedCell = null;\n    this.highlightedVertex = null;\n\n    // Calculate grid dimensions based on type\n    let gridWidth: number, gridHeight: number;\n    if (this.config.gridType === 'squares') {\n      gridWidth = this.config.gridWidth * this.config.gridScale;\n      gridHeight = this.config.gridHeight * this.config.gridScale;\n    } else if (this.config.gridType === 'hexagons') {\n      const hexSpacingX = this.config.gridScale * Math.sqrt(3);\n      const hexSpacingY = this.config.gridScale * 1.5;\n      gridWidth = this.config.gridWidth * hexSpacingX + this.config.gridScale;\n      gridHeight = this.config.gridHeight * hexSpacingY + this.config.gridScale;\n    } else { // triangles\n      const triangleHeight = this.config.gridScale * Math.sqrt(3) / 2;\n      gridWidth = this.config.gridWidth * this.config.gridScale * 0.5 + this.config.gridScale;\n      gridHeight = this.config.gridHeight * triangleHeight + triangleHeight;\n    }\n\n    // Center the grid\n    const offsetX = (this.app.screen.width - gridWidth) / 2;\n    const offsetY = (this.app.screen.height - gridHeight) / 2;\n\n    // Position all containers at the same offset so cells, edges, and particles align\n    this.gridContainer.x = offsetX;\n    this.gridContainer.y = offsetY;\n    this.edgeContainer.x = offsetX;\n    this.edgeContainer.y = offsetY;\n    this.particleContainer.x = offsetX;\n    this.particleContainer.y = offsetY;\n\n    // Convert palette to string format for renderer\n    const paletteStrings: Record<number, string> = {};\n    for (const [key, value] of Object.entries(this.config.palette)) {\n      paletteStrings[parseInt(key)] = typeof value === 'string' ? value : '#000000';\n    }\n\n    // Convert edge palette to string format for renderer\n    const edgePaletteStrings: Record<number, string> = {};\n    for (const [key, value] of Object.entries(this.config.edgePalette)) {\n      edgePaletteStrings[parseInt(key)] = typeof value === 'string' ? value : '#000000';\n    }\n\n    // Render grid\n    this.gridRenderer.render(\n      this.gridContainer,\n      this.edgeContainer,\n      this.config.gridWidth,\n      this.config.gridHeight,\n      this.grid, // Pass grid instance\n      this.cellStates,\n      paletteStrings,\n      typeof this.config.edgeColor === 'string' ? this.config.edgeColor : '#ffffff',\n      this.config.edgeWidth,\n      this.config.showCoordinates\n    );\n  }\n\n  private setupInteraction() {\n    const canvas = this.app.canvas;\n    canvas.addEventListener('mousemove', (e: MouseEvent) => this.handleMouseMove(e));\n    canvas.addEventListener('mousedown', (e: MouseEvent) => this.handleMouseDown(e));\n    canvas.addEventListener('contextmenu', (e: MouseEvent) => e.preventDefault());\n  }\n\n  private handleMouseMove(e: MouseEvent) {\n    const canvas = this.app.canvas;\n    const rect = canvas.getBoundingClientRect();\n    // Use edgeContainer position since edges are in edgeContainer\n    const x = e.clientX - rect.left - this.edgeContainer.x;\n    const y = e.clientY - rect.top - this.edgeContainer.y;\n\n    // Store mouse position for particle cursor rules\n    this.mouseX = x;\n    this.mouseY = y;\n\n    // Remove previous highlights\n    if (this.highlightedEdge) {\n      this.edgeContainer.removeChild(this.highlightedEdge);\n      this.highlightedEdge = null;\n    }\n    if (this.highlightedCell) {\n      this.gridContainer.removeChild(this.highlightedCell);\n      this.highlightedCell = null;\n    }\n    if (this.highlightedVertex) {\n      this.edgeContainer.removeChild(this.highlightedVertex);\n      this.highlightedVertex = null;\n    }\n\n    if (this.config.leftClickMode === 'draw') {\n      // Highlight cell\n      const cellInfo = this.gridRenderer.getCellAt(\n        x, y,\n        this.config.gridWidth,\n        this.config.gridHeight,\n        this.grid // Pass grid\n      );\n\n      if (cellInfo) {\n        const highlightColor = typeof this.config.edgeHighlightColor === 'string' \n          ? this.config.edgeHighlightColor \n          : '#ffff00';\n        this.highlightedCell = this.gridRenderer.drawCellHighlight(\n          cellInfo,\n          this.grid, // Pass grid\n          highlightColor\n        );\n        this.gridContainer.addChild(this.highlightedCell);\n      }\n    } else {\n      // Highlight edge and closest vertex\n      const edgeInfo = this.gridRenderer.getEdgeAt(\n        x, y,\n        this.config.gridWidth,\n        this.config.gridHeight,\n        this.grid // Pass grid\n      );\n\n      if (edgeInfo) {\n        const highlightColor = typeof this.config.edgeHighlightColor === 'string' \n          ? this.config.edgeHighlightColor \n          : '#ffff00';\n        this.highlightedEdge = this.gridRenderer.drawEdge(edgeInfo, highlightColor);\n        this.edgeContainer.addChild(this.highlightedEdge);\n\n        // Find and highlight closest vertex\n        const closestVertex = this.gridRenderer.getClosestVertex(\n          x, y,\n          this.config.gridWidth,\n          this.config.gridHeight,\n          this.grid // Pass grid\n        );\n\n        if (closestVertex) {\n          this.highlightedVertex = this.gridRenderer.drawVertex(closestVertex, highlightColor);\n          if (this.highlightedVertex) {\n            this.edgeContainer.addChild(this.highlightedVertex);\n          }\n        }\n      }\n    }\n  }\n\n  private handleMouseDown(e: MouseEvent) {\n    const canvas = this.app.canvas;\n    const rect = canvas.getBoundingClientRect();\n\n    console.log(\"leftClickMode\", this.config.leftClickMode);\n    \n    if (e.button === 0) {\n      console.log(\"left click\");\n\n      // Left click\n      if (this.config.leftClickMode === 'spawnParticle') {\n        console.log(\"spawn branch\");\n\n        // Check for edge click for particle spawning\n        const edgeX = e.clientX - rect.left - this.edgeContainer.x;\n        const edgeY = e.clientY - rect.top - this.edgeContainer.y;\n        \n        const edgeInfo = this.gridRenderer.getEdgeAt(\n          edgeX, edgeY,\n          this.config.gridWidth,\n          this.config.gridHeight,\n          this.grid // Pass grid\n        );\n\n        if (edgeInfo) {\n          // Spawn particle on edge click\n          this.particleSystem.spawnParticle(edgeInfo, edgeX, edgeY);\n          return;\n        }\n      } else {\n        console.log(\"draw branch\");\n        \n        // Draw mode - check for cell click\n        const x = e.clientX - rect.left - this.gridContainer.x;\n        const y = e.clientY - rect.top - this.gridContainer.y;\n\n        const cellInfo = this.gridRenderer.getCellAt(\n          x, y,\n          this.config.gridWidth,\n          this.config.gridHeight,\n          this.grid // Pass grid\n        );\n\n        if (cellInfo) {\n          this.cellStates[cellInfo.row][cellInfo.col] = this.config.drawState;\n          this.updateGrid();\n        }\n      }\n    } else if (e.button === 2) {\n      // Right click: always clear cell (set to state 0)\n      const x = e.clientX - rect.left - this.gridContainer.x;\n      const y = e.clientY - rect.top - this.gridContainer.y;\n\n      const cellInfo = this.gridRenderer.getCellAt(\n        x, y,\n        this.config.gridWidth,\n        this.config.gridHeight,\n        this.grid // Pass grid\n      );\n\n      if (cellInfo) {\n        this.cellStates[cellInfo.row][cellInfo.col] = 0;\n        this.updateGrid();\n      }\n    }\n  }\n}\n\n// Initialize app when DOM is ready\nif (document.readyState === 'loading') {\n  document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => new GridApp());\n} else {\n  new GridApp();\n}\n"
  }
}

## MODEL ✨

I have successfully refactored the codebase to hide the implementation details of grid geometry within the `Grid` interface and its implementations.

**Key Changes:**

1.  **`src/grid.ts`**:
    *   Expanded the `Grid` interface to include:
        *   `getCellPolygon(cell)`: Returns vertices for a given cell.
        *   `getCellEdges(cell)`: Returns edges for a given cell.
        *   `getEdgeAt(pixel, ...)`: Hit-tests for an edge at a pixel location.
        *   `getVertexAt(pixel, ...)`: Hit-tests for a vertex at a pixel location.
        *   `getEdgesAtVertex(vertex, ...)`: Finds edges connected to a vertex.
    *   Implemented these methods in `SquareGrid`, `HexagonGrid`, and `TriangleGrid`, moving the specific geometry math from the renderer into these classes.

2.  **`src/grid-renderer.ts`**:
    *   Refactored `GridRenderer` to accept a `Grid` instance in its methods.
    *   Removed all internal `switch (gridType)` logic for drawing shapes and finding neighbors/edges.
    *   Now delegates geometry and hit-testing calls to the passed `Grid` object.

3.  **`src/particle-system.ts`**:
    *   Updated `ParticleSystem` to accept a `Grid` instance.
    *   Uses `grid.getEdgesAtVertex` for particle navigation logic.

4.  **`src/main.ts`**:
    *   Updated `GridApp` to instantiate and manage the concrete `Grid` object (e.g., `new HexagonGrid(...)`) based on the configuration.
    *   Passes this `Grid` instance to `GridRenderer` and `ParticleSystem` during updates and interactions.

**Verification:**
*   `npm test` passed: Existing neighbor logic tests are green.
*   `npm run build` passed: The application builds without TypeScript errors.

The code is now much cleaner, with geometry logic encapsulated in the `Grid` classes, making it easier to add new grid types or modify existing ones without touching the rendering or interaction logic.

Content from @scripts/create-project-statistics.ts:
import { execSync } from 'child_process';
import { readFileSync, mkdirSync, writeFileSync, existsSync, readdirSync } from 'fs';
import { join, extname, basename } from 'path';

interface FileStats {
  fileType: string;
  count: number;
  totalLines: number;
  totalWords: number;
}

interface ProjectStatistics {
  timestamp: string;
  fileTypes: FileStats[];
  totals: {
    files: number;
    lines: number;
    words: number;
  };
}

function getFileExtension(filename: string): string {
  const ext = extname(filename);
  return ext || basename(filename);
}

function countLinesAndWords(content: string): { lines: number; words: number } {
  const lines = content.split(/\r?\n/).length;
  const words = content.trim() === '' ? 0 : content.trim().split(/\s+/).length;
  return { lines, words };
}

function getGitTrackedFiles(): string[] {
  try {
    const output = execSync('git ls-files', { encoding: 'utf-8' });
    return output.trim().split('\n').filter(line => line.length > 0);
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('Error getting git tracked files:', error);
    return [];
  }
}

function generateStatistics(): ProjectStatistics {
  const allFiles = getGitTrackedFiles();
  const excludedFolders = [
    'docs/generated',
    'public/project-statistics/generated'
  ];

  const files = allFiles.filter(file => 
    !excludedFolders.some(folder => file.startsWith(folder))
  );
  
  const statsByType = new Map<string, { count: number; lines: number; words: number }>();

  let totalLines = 0;
  let totalWords = 0;

  for (const file of files) {
    try {
      const content = readFileSync(file, 'utf-8');
      const { lines, words } = countLinesAndWords(content);
      
      const fileType = getFileExtension(file);
      const current = statsByType.get(fileType) || { count: 0, lines: 0, words: 0 };
      
      statsByType.set(fileType, {
        count: current.count + 1,
        lines: current.lines + lines,
        words: current.words + words,
      });

      totalLines += lines;
      totalWords += words;
    } catch (error) {
      // Skip files that can't be read (binary files, etc.)
      console.warn(`Warning: Could not read file ${file}:`, error);
    }
  }

  const fileTypes: FileStats[] = Array.from(statsByType.entries())
    .map(([fileType, stats]) => ({
      fileType,
      count: stats.count,
      totalLines: stats.lines,
      totalWords: stats.words,
    }))
    .sort((a, b) => {
      // Primary sort by count (descending)
      if (b.count !== a.count) {
        return b.count - a.count;
      }
      // Secondary sort by totalLines (descending)
      if (b.totalLines !== a.totalLines) {
        return b.totalLines - a.totalLines;
      }
      // Tertiary sort by totalWords (descending)
      return b.totalWords - a.totalWords;
    });

  return {
    timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
    fileTypes,
    totals: {
      files: files.length,
      lines: totalLines,
      words: totalWords,
    },
  };
}

function main() {
  const stats = generateStatistics();
  
  // Generate filename with current timestamp
  const now = new Date();
  const year = now.getFullYear();
  const month = String(now.getMonth() + 1).padStart(2, '0');
  const day = String(now.getDate()).padStart(2, '0');
  const hours = String(now.getHours()).padStart(2, '0');
  const minutes = String(now.getMinutes()).padStart(2, '0');
  
  const filename = `${year}-${month}-${day}_${hours}-${minutes}.json`;
  const outputDir = join(process.cwd(), 'public', 'project-statistics', 'generated');
  const outputPath = join(outputDir, filename);

  // Create directory if it doesn't exist
  if (!existsSync(outputDir)) {
    mkdirSync(outputDir, { recursive: true });
  }

  // Write statistics to file
  writeFileSync(outputPath, JSON.stringify(stats, null, 2), 'utf-8');
  
  // Update index.json with list of all available statistics files
  const existingFiles = readdirSync(outputDir)
    .filter(f => f.endsWith('.json') && f !== 'index.json')
    .sort()
    .reverse(); // Newest first
  const indexPath = join(outputDir, 'index.json');
  const indexData = {
    files: existingFiles
  };
  writeFileSync(indexPath, JSON.stringify(indexData, null, 2), 'utf-8');
  
  console.log(`Project statistics generated: ${outputPath}`);
  console.log(`Total files: ${stats.totals.files}`);
  console.log(`Total lines: ${stats.totals.lines}`);
  console.log(`Total words: ${stats.totals.words}`);
  console.log(`File types: ${stats.fileTypes.length}`);
}

main();
Content from @src/statistics.ts:
import { Pane } from 'tweakpane';

interface FileTypeStats {
  fileType: string;
  count: number;
  totalLines: number;
  totalWords: number;
}

interface ProjectStatistics {
  timestamp: string;
  fileTypes: FileTypeStats[];
  totals: {
    files: number;
    lines: number;
    words: number;
  };
}

type DateTimeTimeZone = 'local' | 'utc';

class StatisticsViewer {
  private pane!: Pane;
  private selectedFile: string = '';
  private availableFiles: string[] = [];
  private statisticsPanel: HTMLElement;
  private config = {
    selectedFile: '',
    dateTimeTimeZone: 'local' as DateTimeTimeZone,
  };
  private currentStatistics: ProjectStatistics | null = null;

  constructor() {
    this.statisticsPanel = document.getElementById('statistics-panel')!;
    this.init();
  }

  private async init() {
    await this.loadAvailableFiles();
    this.initTweakpane();
  }

  private async loadAvailableFiles() {
    try {
      const indexResponse = await fetch('/project-statistics/generated/index.json');
      if (!indexResponse.ok) {
        throw new Error(`Failed to fetch index.json (status: ${indexResponse.status})`);
      }
      const index = await indexResponse.json();
      this.availableFiles = index.files || [];

      if (this.availableFiles.length > 0) {
        this.selectedFile = this.availableFiles[0];
      } else {
        // Handle case where index.json is empty
        this.statisticsPanel.innerHTML = `
          <div class="no-data">
            <p>No statistics files found.</p>
            <p>Please run the generation script to create statistics.</p>
          </div>
        `;
      }
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error loading available statistics files:', error);
      this.availableFiles = [];
      this.statisticsPanel.innerHTML = `
        <div class="no-data">
          <p>Could not load statistics index file (index.json).</p>
          <p>Please ensure you have run the project statistics generation script.</p>
          <p style="font-family: monospace; font-size: 12px; color: #888; margin-top: 10px;">
            ${error instanceof Error ? error.message : 'Unknown error'}
          </p>
        </div>
      `;
    }
  }

  private initTweakpane() {
    const container = document.getElementById('tweakpane-container');
    if (!container) return;

    this.pane = new Pane({ 
      title: 'Statistics Files',
      container: container
    });

    this.config.selectedFile = this.selectedFile;

    // Create options object for dropdown
    const options: Record<string, string> = {};
    this.availableFiles.forEach(file => {
      // Use filename as both key and value, but display a nicer format
      const displayName = formatTimestampFilename(file);
      options[displayName] = file;
    });

    this.pane.addBinding(this.config, 'selectedFile', {
      options: options,
      label: 'Statistics File',
    }).on('change', (ev) => {
      this.selectedFile = ev.value;
      this.loadStatistics(this.selectedFile);
    });

    this.pane.addBinding(this.config, 'dateTimeTimeZone', {
      options: {
        'Local Time': 'local',
        'UTC': 'utc',
      },
      label: 'Timestamp Format',
    }).on('change', () => {
      if (this.currentStatistics) {
        this.displayStatistics(this.currentStatistics);
        return;
      }

      if (this.selectedFile) {
        this.loadStatistics(this.selectedFile);
      }
    });

    // Load initial file
    if (this.selectedFile) {
      this.loadStatistics(this.selectedFile);
    }
  }

  private async loadStatistics(filename: string) {
    try {
      const response = await fetch(`/project-statistics/generated/${filename}`);
      if (!response.ok) {
        throw new Error(`Failed to load ${filename}`);
      }

      const data: ProjectStatistics = await response.json();
      this.currentStatistics = data;
      this.displayStatistics(data);
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error loading statistics:', error);
      this.statisticsPanel.innerHTML = `
        <div class="no-data">
          <p>Error loading statistics file: ${filename}</p>
          <p>${error instanceof Error ? error.message : 'Unknown error'}</p>
        </div>
      `;
    }
  }

  private displayStatistics(data: ProjectStatistics) {
    const timestamp = this.config.dateTimeTimeZone === 'utc'
      ? formatIsoTimestampUtc(data.timestamp)
      : formatIsoTimestampLocal(data.timestamp);

    this.statisticsPanel.innerHTML = `
      <h2>Project Statistics</h2>
      
      <div class="stat-section">
        <h3>Overview</h3>
        <div class="stat-grid">
          <div class="stat-item">
            <div class="stat-item-label">Total Files</div>
            <div class="stat-item-value">${data.totals.files.toLocaleString()}</div>
          </div>
          <div class="stat-item">
            <div class="stat-item-label">Total Lines</div>
            <div class="stat-item-value">${data.totals.lines.toLocaleString()}</div>
          </div>
          <div class="stat-item">
            <div class="stat-item-label">Total Words</div>
            <div class="stat-item-value">${data.totals.words.toLocaleString()}</div>
          </div>
          <div class="stat-item">
            <div class="stat-item-label">Generated</div>
            <div class="stat-item-value" style="font-size: 14px;">${timestamp}</div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="stat-section">
        <h3>File Types Breakdown</h3>
        <table class="file-type-table">
          <thead>
            <tr>
              <th>File Type</th>
              <th>Count</th>
              <th>Lines</th>
              <th>Words</th>
            </tr>
          </thead>
          <tbody>
            ${data.fileTypes.map(ft => `
              <tr>
                <td class="file-type">${ft.fileType || '(no extension)'}</td>
                <td>${ft.count.toLocaleString()}</td>
                <td>${ft.totalLines.toLocaleString()}</td>
                <td>${ft.totalWords.toLocaleString()}</td>
              </tr>
            `).join('')}
          </tbody>
        </table>
      </div>
    `;
  }
}

// Initialize the statistics viewer when the page loads
new StatisticsViewer();

function formatTimestampFilename(filename: string): string {
  // Expected: YYYY-MM-DD_HH-MM(.ext)
  const match = filename.match(
    /^(\d{4})-(\d{2})-(\d{2})_(\d{2})-(\d{2})(?:\.\w+)?$/
  );

  if (!match) {
    throw new Error(`Invalid timestamp filename: ${filename}`);
  }

  const [, year, month, day, hour, minute] = match;

  return `${year}/${month}/${day} ${hour}:${minute}`;
}

function formatIsoTimestampUtc(iso: string): string {
  const date = new Date(iso);

  if (Number.isNaN(date.getTime())) {
    throw new Error(`Invalid ISO timestamp: ${iso}`);
  }

  const pad = (n: number) => String(n).padStart(2, "0");

  return [
    date.getUTCFullYear(),
    pad(date.getUTCMonth() + 1),
    pad(date.getUTCDate()),
  ].join("/") + " " +
    [
      pad(date.getUTCHours()),
      pad(date.getUTCMinutes()),
      pad(date.getUTCSeconds()),
    ].join(":");
}

export function formatIsoTimestampLocal(iso: string): string {
  const date = new Date(iso);

  if (Number.isNaN(date.getTime())) {
    throw new Error(`Invalid ISO timestamp: ${iso}`);
  }

  const pad = (n: number) => String(n).padStart(2, "0");

  return [
    date.getFullYear(),
    pad(date.getMonth() + 1),
    pad(date.getDate()),
  ].join("/") + " " +
    [
      pad(date.getHours()),
      pad(date.getMinutes()),
      pad(date.getSeconds()),
    ].join(":");
}

'path';\n\ninterface FileStats {\n  fileType: string;\n  count: number;\n  totalLines: number;\n  totalWords: number;\n}\n\ninterface ProjectStatistics {\n  timestamp: string;\n  fileTypes: FileStats[];\n  totals: {\n    files: number;\n    lines: number;\n    words: number;\n  };\n}\n\nfunction getFileExtension(filename: string): string {\n  const ext = extname(filename);\n  return ext || basename(filename);\n}\n\nfunction countLinesAndWords(content: string): { lines: number; words: number } {\n  const lines = content.split(/\\r?\\n/).length;\n  const words = content.trim() === '' ? 0 : content.trim().split(/\\s+/).length;\n  return { lines, words };\n}\n\nfunction getGitTrackedFiles(): string[] {\n  try {\n    const output = execSync('git ls-files', { encoding: 'utf-8' });\n    return output.trim().split('\\n').filter(line => line.length > 0);\n  } catch (error) {\n    console.error('Error getting git tracked files:', error);\n    return [];\n  }\n}\n\nfunction generateStatistics(): ProjectStatistics {\n  const allFiles = getGitTrackedFiles();\n  const excludedFolders = [\n    'docs/generated',\n    'public/project-statistics/generated'\n  ];\n\n  const files = allFiles.filter(file => \n    !excludedFolders.some(folder => file.startsWith(folder))\n  );\n  \n  const statsByType = new Map<string, { count: number; lines: number; words: number }>();\n\n  let totalLines = 0;\n  let totalWords = 0;\n\n  for (const file of files) {\n    try {\n      const content = readFileSync(file, 'utf-8');\n      const { lines, words } = countLinesAndWords(content);\n      \n      const fileType = getFileExtension(file);\n      const current = statsByType.get(fileType) || { count: 0, lines: 0, words: 0 };\n      \n      statsByType.set(fileType, {\n        count: current.count + 1,\n        lines: current.lines + lines,\n        words: current.words + words,\n      });\n\n      totalLines += lines;\n      totalWords += words;\n    } catch (error) {\n      // Skip files that can't be read (binary files, etc.)\n      console.warn(`Warning: Could not read file ${file}:`, error);\n    }\n  }\n\n  const fileTypes: FileStats[] = Array.from(statsByType.entries())\n    .map(([fileType, stats]) => ({\n      fileType,\n      count: stats.count,\n      totalLines: stats.lines,\n      totalWords: stats.words,\n    }))\n    .sort((a, b) => {\n      // Primary sort by count (descending)\n      if (b.count !== a.count) {\n        return b.count - a.count;\n      }\n      // Secondary sort by totalLines (descending)\n      if (b.totalLines !== a.totalLines) {\n        return b.totalLines - a.totalLines;\n      }\n      // Tertiary sort by totalWords (descending)\n      return b.totalWords - a.totalWords;\n    });\n\n  return {\n    timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),\n    fileTypes,\n    totals: {\n      files: files.length,\n      lines: totalLines,\n      words: totalWords,\n    },\n  };\n}\n\nfunction main() {\n  const stats = generateStatistics();\n  \n  // Generate filename with current timestamp\n  const now = new Date();\n  const year = now.getFullYear();\n  const month = String(now.getMonth() + 1).padStart(2, '0');\n  const day = String(now.getDate()).padStart(2, '0');\n  const hours = String(now.getHours()).padStart(2, '0');\n  const minutes = String(now.getMinutes()).padStart(2, '0');\n  \n  const filename = `${year}-${month}-${day}_${hours}-${minutes}.json`;\n  const outputDir = join(process.cwd(), 'public', 'project-statistics', 'generated');\n  const outputPath = join(outputDir, filename);\n\n  // Create directory if it doesn't exist\n  if (!existsSync(outputDir)) {\n    mkdirSync(outputDir, { recursive: true });\n  }\n\n  // Write statistics to file\n  writeFileSync(outputPath, JSON.stringify(stats, null, 2), 'utf-8');\n  \n  // Update index.json with list of all available statistics files\n  const existingFiles = readdirSync(outputDir)\n    .filter(f => f.endsWith('.json') && f !== 'index.json')\n    .sort()\n    .reverse(); // Newest first\n  const indexPath = join(outputDir, 'index.json');\n  const indexData = {\n    files: existingFiles\n  };\n  writeFileSync(indexPath, JSON.stringify(indexData, null, 2), 'utf-8');\n  \n  console.log(`Project statistics generated: ${outputPath}`);\n  console.log(`Total files: ${stats.totals.files}`);\n  console.log(`Total lines: ${stats.totals.lines}`);\n  console.log(`Total words: ${stats.totals.words}`);\n  console.log(`File types: ${stats.fileTypes.length}`);\n}\n\nmain();",
    "instruction": "Add totalBytes to FileStats and ProjectStatistics interfaces. Use fs.statSync to get file size in bytes and accumulate it. Log total bytes in main function.",

    "new_string": "import { execSync } from 'child_process';\nimport { readFileSync, mkdirSync, writeFileSync, existsSync, readdirSync, statSync } from 'fs';\nimport { join, extname, basename } from 'path';\n\ninterface FileStats {\n  fileType: string;\n  count: number;\n  totalLines: number;\n  totalWords: number;\n  totalBytes: number;\n}\n\ninterface ProjectStatistics {\n  timestamp: string;\n  fileTypes: FileStats[];\n  totals: {\n    files: number;\n    lines: number;\n    words: number;\n    bytes: number;\n  };\n}\n\nfunction getFileExtension(filename: string): string {\n  const ext = extname(filename);\n  return ext || basename(filename);\n}\n\nfunction countLinesAndWords(content: string): { lines: number; words: number } {\n  const lines = content.split(/\\r?\\n/).length;\n  const words = content.trim() === '' ? 0 : content.trim().split(/\\s+/).length;\n  return { lines, words };\n}\n\nfunction getGitTrackedFiles(): string[] {\n  try {\n    const output = execSync('git ls-files', { encoding: 'utf-8' });\n    return output.trim().split('\\n').filter(line => line.length > 0);\n  } catch (error) {\n    console.error('Error getting git tracked files:', error);\n    return [];\n  }\n}\n\nfunction generateStatistics(): ProjectStatistics {\n  const allFiles = getGitTrackedFiles();\n  const excludedFolders = [\n    'docs/generated',\n    'public/project-statistics/generated'\n  ];\n\n  const files = allFiles.filter(file => \n    !excludedFolders.some(folder => file.startsWith(folder))\n  );\n  \n  const statsByType = new Map<string, { count: number; lines: number; words: number; bytes: number }>();\n\n  let totalLines = 0;\n  let totalWords = 0;\n  let totalBytes = 0;\n\n  for (const file of files) {\n    try {\n      const content = readFileSync(file, 'utf-8');\n      const { lines, words } = countLinesAndWords(content);\n      const stats = statSync(file);\n      const bytes = stats.size;\n      \n      const fileType = getFileExtension(file);\n      const current = statsByType.get(fileType) || { count: 0, lines: 0, words: 0, bytes: 0 };\n      \n      statsByType.set(fileType, {\n        count: current.count + 1,\n        lines: current.lines + lines,\n        words: current.words + words,\n        bytes: current.bytes + bytes,\n      });\n\n      totalLines += lines;\n      totalWords += words;\n      totalBytes += bytes;\n    } catch (error) {\n      // Skip files that can't be read (binary files, etc.)\n      console.warn(`Warning: Could not read file ${file}:`, error);\n    }\n  }\n\n  const fileTypes: FileStats[] = Array.from(statsByType.entries())\n    .map(([fileType, stats]) => ({\n      fileType,\n      count: stats.count,\n      totalLines: stats.lines,\n      totalWords: stats.words,\n      totalBytes: stats.bytes,\n    }))\n    .sort((a, b) => {\n      // Primary sort by count (descending)\n      if (b.count !== a.count) {\n        return b.count - a.count;\n      }\n      // Secondary sort by totalLines (descending)\n      if (b.totalLines !== a.totalLines) {\n        return b.totalLines - a.totalLines;\n      }\n      // Tertiary sort by totalWords (descending)\n      return b.totalWords - a.totalWords;\n    });\n\n  return {\n    timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),\n    fileTypes,\n    totals: {\n      files: files.length,\n      lines: totalLines,\n      words: totalWords,\n      bytes: totalBytes,\n    },\n  };\n}\n\nfunction main() {\n  const stats = generateStatistics();\n  \n  // Generate filename with current timestamp\n  const now = new Date();\n  const year = now.getFullYear();\n  const month = String(now.getMonth() + 1).padStart(2, '0');\n  const day = String(now.getDate()).padStart(2, '0');\n  const hours = String(now.getHours()).padStart(2, '0');\n  const minutes = String(now.getMinutes()).padStart(2, '0');\n  \n  const filename = `${year}-${month}-${day}_${hours}-${minutes}.json`;\n  const outputDir = join(process.cwd(), 'public', 'project-statistics', 'generated');\n  const outputPath = join(outputDir, filename);\n\n  // Create directory if it doesn't exist\n  if (!existsSync(outputDir)) {\n    mkdirSync(outputDir, { recursive: true });\n  }\n\n  // Write statistics to file\n  writeFileSync(outputPath, JSON.stringify(stats, null, 2), 'utf-8');\n  \n  // Update index.json with list of all available statistics files\n  const existingFiles = readdirSync(outputDir)\n    .filter(f => f.endsWith('.json') && f !== 'index.json')\n    .sort()\n    .reverse(); // Newest first\n  const indexPath = join(outputDir, 'index.json');\n  const indexData = {\n    files: existingFiles\n  };\n  writeFileSync(indexPath, JSON.stringify(indexData, null, 2), 'utf-8');\n  \n  console.log(`Project statistics generated: ${outputPath}`);\n  console.log(`Total files: ${stats.totals.files}`);\n  console.log(`Total lines: ${stats.totals.lines}`);\n  console.log(`Total words: ${stats.totals.words}`);\n  console.log(`Total bytes: ${stats.totals.bytes}`);\n  console.log(`File types: ${stats.fileTypes.length}`);\n}\n\nmain();"
  }
}

---

## MODEL ✨

I have updated `@scripts/create-project-statistics.ts` to calculate and store `totalBytes` for file types and totals. I also updated `@src/statistics.ts` to display these new byte counts, showing `?` for historical data where this information is not available.

Summary of changes:
1.  **`scripts/create-project-statistics.ts`**:
    *   Updated `FileStats` and `ProjectStatistics` interfaces to include byte counts.
    *   Imported `statSync` from `fs`.
    *   In the file processing loop, used `statSync(file).size` to get file size in bytes.
    *   Accumulated total bytes per file type and for the project total.
    *   Logged total bytes in the console output.

2.  **`src/statistics.ts`**:
    *   Updated `FileTypeStats` and `ProjectStatistics` interfaces to include optional byte counts (`totalBytes?`, `bytes?`).
    *   Updated `displayStatistics` to include "Total Bytes" in the Overview section.
    *   Updated the "File Types Breakdown" table to include a "Bytes" column.
    *   Used optional chaining and nullish coalescing (`ft.totalBytes !== undefined ? ... : '?'`) to handle missing data gracefully.

---

## USER 🧑‍💻

when creating the statistics ignore the docs folder and the TODOS.md file
